title: The Thundering Herd
actors: Jack Holt, Lois Wilson, Noah Beery
plot: In 1876, a band of buffalo hunters assembles at Sprague's Trading Post and is joined by Tom Doan, fresh from a Kansas farm. At the post, Tom meets, and falls in love with, Milly Fayre, the stepdaughter of Randall Jett, the leader ...
